summary: The agent correctly identifies that palbociclib is specifically designed for breast cancer as a CDK4/6 inhibitor and notes there is no support from existing literature regarding its application or effectiveness in treating glioblastoma. Based solely on the given evidence, palbociclib has neither been studied nor shown to be effective against glioblastoma.
